title: Health endpoint in tenant container returns correct JSON shape
evidence: All 8 TC-038 tests passed in 217ms: - ✓ health-server.js file exists at docker/tenant-image/health-server.js - ✓ source code contains GET /health handler (http.createServer, req.url !== '/health', req.method !== 'GET') - ✓ GET /health sets Content-Type: application/json - ✓ unhealthy response shape: {ok: false, status: 'starting', checks: {openclaw: bool, workspace_mounted: bool, home_mounted: bool}} — no uptime_ms, HTTP 503 - ✓ source code defines healthy response shape {ok: true, status: 'healthy', checks, uptime_ms} - ✓ source code defines unhealthy response shape {ok: false, status: 'starting', checks} - ✓ source code defines all three required check fields (openclaw, workspace_mounted, home_mounted) - ✓ runtime GET /health returns JSON-parseable response with all required shape fields
